allow: PowerShell($url = "https://github.com/git-for-windows/git/releases/download/v2.54.0.windows.1/Git-2.54.0-64-bit.exe" ; $out = "$env:TEMP\\Git-2.54.0-64-bit.exe" ; if \(Test-Path $out\) { Remove-Item $out } ; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out ; Write-Output "下载完成: $out")
PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\Git-2.54.0-64-bit.exe" -ArgumentList "/VERYSILENT /NORESTART /DIR=D:\\app\\Git" -Wait -NoNewWindow; Write-Output "安装完成，退出代码: $LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\app\\Git\\bin\\git.exe"\) { Write-Output "Git 已安装"; $env:PATH = "D:\\app\\Git\\bin;$env:PATH"; git --version } else { Write-Output "Git 未找到" })

PowerShell($env:PATH = "D:\\app\\Git\\bin;$env:PATH"; git config --global user.name "lpeiyi"; git config --global user.email "lpeiyi@yeah.net"; Set-Location "G:\\products\\指南针股票app活跃市值指数0AMV"; git init; Write-Output "---"; git config user.name; git config user.email)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "D:\\app\\Git\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location "G:\\products\\指南针股票app活跃市值指数0AMV"; git add -A; git status)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "D:\\app\\Git\\bin;$env:PATH"; git config --global --add safe.directory "G:/products/指南针股票app活跃市值指数0AMV")
PowerShell($env:PATH = "D:\\app\\Git\\bin;$env:PATH"; Set-Location "G:\\products\\指南针股票app活跃市值指数0AMV"; git remote add origin https://github.com/lpeiyi/0AMV.git; git push -u origin master)
